Enum Class HandRanking

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<HandRanking>
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.HandRanking
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<HandRanking>, Constable
public enum HandRanking extends Enum<HandRanking>
Enum representing the different hand rankings in poker. Each ranking has an associated number of kickers. The lower the number, the better the hand.

  • Field Details

    • numberOfKickers

      public final int numberOfKickers
      The number of kickers associated with this hand ranking. A kicker is a card that can be used to break ties between hands of the same rank.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static HandRanking[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    • valueOf

      public static HandRanking valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
